scope.summary: Windows shipping_spool concurrency tests fixed by replacing Linux-calibrated wall-clock budgets with GateForwarder property assertions; Windows CI lane confirmed green.
out_of_scope: Oracle FREE 23ai matrix failure on the same CI run (unrelated)

entry_points.name: cargo test -p oraclemcp-audit --lib shipping_spool
entry_points.trace: Fix at 731b083a replaced 150ms/1000ms wall-clock budgets with GateForwarder: gate proves delivery=0 while appends return, gap-free 1..=8 preserved, 30s hang detector only. 244 audit tests pass on Linux; each targeted test passed 50 consecutive runs.

entry_points.name: GitHub Actions Rust workspace (Windows) — run 29899848208
entry_points.trace: gh run view 29899848208: head 40b1f032 (contains fix 731b083a as ancestor). Job 'Rust workspace (Windows)' conclusion=success. The two tests that failed on run 29831595915 (concurrent_local_chain_stays_gap_free_while_shipping_is_stalled, slow_destination_does_not_delay_durable_local_append) pass on Windows.

limitations: The overall CI run 29899848208 has an unrelated Oracle FREE 23ai matrix failure; only the Windows workspace lane is cited as green
